name: Tomato Salsa
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Can of mild green chiles, drained
1 jalapeno pepper, or 2 jalapeno peppers, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients in the container of a food processor.
2. Pulse on and off until the mixture is a coarse puree.
3. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
